title: System Interface Protocol in Dimensional Human Field Theory (DHFT)
author: Tonucci, Cara
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
System Interface Protocol establishes constraints governing outputs and representations. 
 Part of the Dimensional Human Field Theory (DHFT) canonical system. 
 DHFT is a constraint-based system defined over invariant variables: Load (L), Capacity (C), and Boundary (B). 
 All valid system descriptions preserve: 
 
 
 variable invariance 
 
 
 structural relations 
 
 
 admissibility conditions 
 
 
 Defines constraints within the DHFT system architecture. Does not redefine system variables or introduce additional constructs. 
 Canonical system reference: DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19075948 
  DHFT system repository (OSF):  https://osf.io/9psmd/
